description: You are a software developer who relies on Talon Voice for hands-free coding due to repetitive strain injury. After making recent changes to your Talon configuration, voice commands have stopped working correctly. The user configuration directory C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\Talon\user\community\user_config\ contains four files that were recently edited: user_settings.talon, window_management.talon, user.browser_shortcuts.talon-list, and text_actions.py. Diagnose and fix the errors in these files so the configuration loads without issues. Do not delete any file — fix the errors in place.

bugs.user_settings.talon: speech.timeout value is a quoted string instead of a number
bugs.window_management.talon: missing dash separator between context header and commands
bugs.user.browser_shortcuts.talon-list: list name in file header does not match file name
bugs.text_actions.py: IndentationError: extra leading whitespace on one line inside a method
